Farmers Market

Saturdays, 8 am – noon
May – October
215 S. Spring Street
On the corner of S. Spring St. and Henry St. in Beaver Dam
The market is located across from Ooga Brewing Company.

Get Directions

Event Details

Become a Vendor

The Beaver Dam Farmers’ Market located at 215 S. Spring St. exists to provide an open-air, outdoor market in downtown Beaver Dam for consumers to purchase a variety of fresh food and produce and locally hand crafted products directly from farmers, producers, crafters, and artisans.

How about some fresh veggies or yummy baked goods? Shopping for farm-fresh meats or farm-fresh eggs? Our crafts producers specialize in unique gifts for your home or garden, and our plant growers always have seasonal offerings from cut bouquets to nursery stock.

We do accept EBT/Quest/SNAP Cards and will give you market dollars to shop with on Saturdays beginning June 6th, 2026. In addition we accept FMNP WIC and Senior Dollars at many of our vendors.  MARKET MATCH: Thanks to our sponsor Marshfield Medical Center, we will double your WIC, SENIOR and EBT/Quest dollars on Saturdays beginning in June.  Look for our table and sandwich board at the market.  

Visit us May – October, every Saturday from 8 AM – Noon. Rain or Shine! 

Thank you to our Farmers Market Sponsors!

Our Goals

Our goals are to provide more access to healthy and nutritious food and to enhance the quality of life in Beaver Dam by providing a venue that fosters community and social interaction, as well as cultural vibrancy and economic vitality. It is also to educate the community on the benefits of purchasing locally.

Become A Farmers Market Vendor

Farmers Market Vendors Meeting

5-6PM, Thursday, March 26, 2026

Join us for the Beaver Dam Farmers Market Vendor Meeting, open to new and returning vendors interested in participating in the 2026 Farmers Market season. This meeting will cover important details, expectations, and updates for the upcoming season.

Anyone planning to vend or interested in learning more about vending at the Beaver Dam Farmers Market is encouraged to attend.

 

 Application does not guarantee acceptance in the market.

For Kids...Want to be a part of the "Mini Boss" Project and Sell at the Farmers Market?

The “Mini Boss” Project is an opportunity for your child (17 and under) to be an entrepreneur and learn about running a small business at a Farmers Market. There is no cost to participate, but there is little worthwhile time to be invested in filling out the business plan, preparing for and working the market, and completing the business summary. In the end, your child will get foundational business skills to hopefully inspire them to be a future entrepreneur!  MINI BOSS SPOTS WILL OPEN UP THE JANUARY 2026.

LEARN MORE
rEGISTER

Thank you to our Project Mini Boss Sponsors!

Do you have a question about an event or want to learn more? We are here to help! Visit our Facebook page
